name: The Best Pound Cake Ever
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Let everything sit out and become room temperature.
3. Cream together the butter and cream cheese. Add the powdered sugar 1 cup at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Add the eggs, one at a time, ensuring they are mixed thoroughly after each addition.
5. Gradually add 1 cup of flour, followed by the vanilla extract, until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Bake in a buttered and floured bundt pan for about 75 - 85 minutes. Check with an object to ensure it comes out clean when inserted.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool for approximately 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
